message:
feat: add play/stop/restart lifecycle controls for local clusters (#3545) (#3596)

Add inline start, stop, and restart buttons for local clusters (kind,
minikube, k3d) on the My Clusters page. Backend adds a new
/local-cluster-lifecycle endpoint that dispatches start/stop/restart
to the appropriate CLI tool. Frontend detects local platforms via the
existing cloud provider detection and renders controls inline with
each cluster card in all layout modes.

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
